UCBIC

OBD Information

Protocol: ISO8
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: AE
Func Name: UCBIC ISO8

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "6100010104",
    "name": "activ. des actuateurs demi Param",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Nombre de cycles - demi": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Sortie pilotée 4 bits pds faible": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Temps activation - demi": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Temps inactivation - demi": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "6100010104",
    "name": "activ. des actuateurs Param à 2 octets",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "double de Nombre de cycles": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "double de Sortie pilotée": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "double de Temps inactivation": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "6100010104",

        "firstbyte": 3,

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true

    "name": "Identification",
    "deny_sds": [

      "engineering",

    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Indice évolution": {
        "firstbyte": 11,

      },

        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Numéro client": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Version hard": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Version soft": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "sentbytes": "32",
    "name": "Mode diag Etudes",

  },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 4,

      },

        "firstbyte": 8,

      },

        "firstbyte": 3,

      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
